exploratory_background: Earlier development and pilot runs were used only to build the bank, stabilize staged labeling, and freeze the final three-condition intervention package. They should not be pooled with the final confirmatory evidence.
project_question: Does an explicit disclosure duty improve proactive disclosure of material risk under omission pressure, relative to baseline and a generic control, without unacceptable benign over-warning or timeliness cost?
title: Disclosure Duties for LLM Assistants: A Locked Confirmatory Study of Omission Pressure on GPT-5 Mini
